lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and have been meticulously maintained.
Fair condition.
The vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior. All major systems are functional and the vehicle is well-maintained.

Get ready to hit the road in this dependable ride! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its years of service, this vehicle is in fair condition and remains a functional, budget-friendly option. It’s perfect for someone looking for a solid foundation at a great price point!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior is clean and presents well, though there are a few minor cosmetic imperfections such as small rock chips on the front bumper consistent with regular use. The interior is tidy and smoke-free, showing only light wear on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car is solid, shifts smoothly, and has a documented history of routine maintenance, offering a reliable and comfortable driving experience for its next owner.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and has been meticulously cared for, appearing almost exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, glass-like shine, free of any swirl marks, stone chips, or scratches. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic feature, from the infotainment system to the climate control, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been maintained with an open checkbook and a full service history at authorized dealerships. This is a collector-grade example that offers a like-new driving experience and comes complete with all original keys, manuals, and documentation.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this automobile delivers a refined driving experience. Its comprehensive service history confirms a commitment to excellence, ensuring both reliable performance and enduring value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for all your weekend adventures or daily commutes! I’ve taken great care of it, so it runs smoothly and looks great inside and out. I’m looking for a quick, easy sale to someone who will appreciate it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see this go to a great new home!

Offering a driver-focused 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the high-revving S54B32 3.2L inline-six engine. This naturally aspirated mill utilizes six individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing to produce a linear power band. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, feeding power through an M Variable Differential Lock. Recent mechanical sorting includes a comprehensive valve clearance adjustment and proactive rod bearing replacement. The chassis remains rigid with a reinforced rear subframe. While the exterior displays minor road-rash and clear coat imperfections consistent with its 'good' status, the mechanical vitals are robust. Suspension features refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers for precise turn-in. An honest, mechanically sound example of an analog legend.
Used car. Good condition. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well. Maintenance up to date.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and offers a fantastic driving experience for its next owner. The exterior retains a beautiful finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the seats show minimal wear, and all interior components, including the infotainment system and dual-zone climate control, function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in strong shape, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. The tires are in great condition with significant tread life left, and the suspension provides a comfortable, quiet ride. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that perfectly bridges the gap between value and performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it remains in commendable condition, offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved aesthetic. This is a premier opportunity for the discerning driver to acquire a reliable, high-caliber automobile at a strategic market price.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, this model balances consistent performance with sophisticated aesthetics. Our rigorous inspection process ensures mechanical integrity, offering a refined driving experience that exceeds standards for its class. Acquire a vehicle that embodies both reliability and prestige.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that still looks great on the road? I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in solid shape, runs super smoothly, and has been well-maintained. It's perfect for daily commutes or weekend adventures. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it feels behind the wheel!

Available is a well-sorted E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six. This naturally aspirated powerhouse utilizes individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing to deliver linear power up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, sending torque through a factory limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral loads. The suspension retains its factory-spec geometry with refreshed bushings, offering the precise turn-in and communicative chassis feedback these cars are known for. Cosmetically honest with a clean title, this example is mechanically robust and optimized for the driving enthusiast
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Ready to drive.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a reliable, well-maintained driver that balances performance with everyday utility. The exterior retains a beautiful gloss, with only minor stone chips on the front fascia and a small, superficial scuff on the rear bumper—typical signs of careful road use. Inside, the cabin remains a smoke-free environment with leather upholstery that has been regularly conditioned; there are no rips or significant bolster wear. All electronic features, including the dual-zone climate control and premium sound system, are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is solid. It has a documented service history, including a recent oil change and brake pad replacement. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts crisply through all gears. While not a museum piece, it is an honest, high-quality vehicle that has been looked after with pride. It is currently fitted with tires that have approximately 70% tread remaining, making it ready for the road immediately upon purchase.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers reliable performance and a refined driving experience. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, it offers a superior balance of value and prestige.

This expertly maintained vehicle offers a distinguished combination of mechanical integrity and refined presentation. Having passed our comprehensive multi-point inspection, it stands as a testament to consistent care and reliable performance. This represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber driving experience and proven longevity.

Hey there! I’m so excited to find a new home for this awesome ride! It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in wonderful shape, just waiting for its next adventure. It runs like a dream and has been really well-maintained. You’re going to love how it handles on the road—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend getaway!

This 2004 BMW M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains taut with a reinforced rear subframe and upgraded bushings, addressing the platform's known lateral stress points. The dual-VANOS system has been professionally serviced to ensure optimal variable valve timing across the rev range. Equipped with a factory limited-slip differential and a MacPherson strut/multi-link suspension setup, this example provides the precise turn-in and mechanical feedback purists demand. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its mileage, the drivetrain is mechanically robust and the throttle response is sharp.
Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear on exterior. Interior is clean. Engine runs strong. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained luxury SUV offers the perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior features a stunning deep sapphire metallic finish that still catches the light beautifully, with only minor, expected road wear on the front fascia consistent with careful use. Inside, you’ll find a pristine cabin with premium leather upholstery, free of any tears or odors, and a suite of fully functional tech features including the panoramic sunroof and navigation system. Mechanically, this vehicle is solid; it has been serviced regularly at recommended intervals, with a recent inspection confirming the engine and transmission are in excellent working order. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. It is a reliable, elegant daily driver that has been cared for with pride and is ready for its next owner to drive away with peace of mind.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional character and proven reliability. This model has been curated to meet rigorous standards, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience. Featuring a well-maintained aesthetic and robust mechanical integrity, it offers an ideal balance of value and prestige for the serious enthusiast.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, the unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure optimal roadworthiness. It offers a sophisticated driving experience and stands as a testament to diligent previous ownership, providing exceptional value within its class.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride, and it’s honestly in such great shape! It’s been super dependable for me, and I’ve made sure to keep it well-maintained over the years. It drives smoothly and looks fantastic both inside and out. If you’re looking for a solid, high-quality car that’s ready to hit the road today, this is definitely the one for you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!
This E92 M3 represents a mechanically sorted example of BMW’s high-revving peak, centered around the S65 4.0L
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean interior. Recent service completed. Reliable daily driver.

Presenting a meticulously maintained 2018 Audi A4 Premium Plus in Moonlight Blue Metallic. This vehicle strikes a perfect balance between luxury and performance, showing in well-cared-for condition throughout. The exterior paint maintains a deep luster, complemented by a clean Nougat Brown leather interior that remains smoke-free and supple. All premium features, including the Audi Virtual Cockpit, sunroof, and Bang & Olufsen sound system, are fully operational. Under the hood, the 2.0T engine delivers a responsive drive, supported by a documented service history and recent maintenance including a fresh oil change and brake inspection. You may find minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with gentle road use, such as light stone peppering on the front fascia and a small scuff on the rear passenger alloy wheel, but the car remains mechanically robust and aesthetically impressive. This is a sophisticated, reliable sedan ready for its next owner.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle is offered in commendable condition, reflecting a history of attentive care and consistent maintenance. It delivers a refined driving experience characterized by mechanical reliability and a well-preserved interior. This offering represents an exceptional acquisition for those seeking an optimal balance of prestige and performance at a competitive valuation.
